title: Marketplace Manager - Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions:
Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
